title: RTX ON
description: Insane graphics, insane physics, even able to play on VR, perfect. Optimise your minecraft to be like the minecraft 'insane graphics' tiktoks that you might have seen.
body: Insane graphics, insane physics, even able to play on VR, perfect. Optimise your minecraft to be like the minecraft 'insane graphics' tiktoks that you might have seen. The immersive portals mod only works on version 1.20.4, the creator of the mod hasn't updated the mod for a while so please wait as there may be a fix soon.
